title: tussaca autumnalis
intro: Tussaca autumnalis, also known as Common Yarrow or Achillea millefolium, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Tussaca autumnalis include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Tussaca autumnalis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
